name: @platform/audit-events
description: Audit event bus: structured event emission, schema-validated audit records, and durable delivery contracts.

readme.summary: Audit event bus: structured event emission, schema-validated audit records, and durable delivery contracts.
responsibilities: Define the canonical audit event schema and typed event emitter interface
Emit structured audit records for security-relevant actions (auth, data access, mutations)
Guarantee at-least-once delivery semantics for durable audit trails
Remain decoupled from any specific storage or transport implementation
nonResponsibilities: Does not store audit records directly (delegated to adapter or queue)
Does not implement compliance reporting or dashboards
Does not own business event schemas for domain workflows
usage: Imported by api-runtime and worker-runtime to emit audit events at operation boundaries
Feature packages may emit domain-level audit events via the typed emitter
operationalNotes: Audit events must not be dropped — configure durable delivery in production
Schema versioning must be incremented on any audit field addition
